hero.headline: Unlock Your Future with Language Skills
hero.description: World-class language courses in Central London. Expert teachers, proven results, and a community of learners from over 80 countries.
hero.socialProof: Join 1000+ students already learning with us

about.heroDescription: London Language Academy has been a pillar of language education in London for nearly a hundred years. In 2021, we brought that legacy to Turkey, opening our first centre in Bursa.
about.heroBody: We make a difference with our innovative and unique education system — offering lifetime support, native speaker teachers, and endless activities across our Bursa and Istanbul centres.
about.missionText: Our mission is to make the language learning process an effective, enjoyable, and personalised experience — helping our students achieve their personal and professional goals. With our experienced instructors and innovative teaching methods, we aim to maximise every student's language potential.
about.visionText: Our vision is to be an educational institution that transforms language learning at both national and international levels. Through our centres in Bursa and Istanbul, we provide the best support on your language learning journey, helping you gain a global perspective and go beyond cultural boundaries.
about.teamSubheading: Our team brings together decades of language teaching expertise, academic rigour, and genuine passion for student success.
about.ctaTitle: Join the free placement test now!
about.ctaDescription: Discover your language level and find the right course for you.

resultsDriven.title: Results-Driven
resultsDriven.description: Every decision we make is guided by one question: will this help our students achieve their goals faster and more effectively?

genuineCare.title: Genuine Care
genuineCare.description: We invest in every student as an individual. Our pastoral support, flexible policies, and open-door culture reflect a genuine commitment to your wellbeing.

academicExcellence.title: Academic Excellence
academicExcellence.description: We hold ourselves to the highest academic standards, continuously investing in teacher training, curriculum development, and learning resources.

globalPerspective.title: Global Perspective
globalPerspective.description: Our student body represents over 80 countries. This diversity enriches every classroom and prepares our students for the real international world.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We are transparent about what we offer, honest about what to expect, and rigorous in upholding our accreditation standards and commitments.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.description: Language education is evolving. We stay at the forefront of methodology, technology, and research to ensure our courses remain best-in-class.

about.whyDescription: London Language Academy offers a unique and modern teaching style. Drawing on years of experience, we have developed a teaching approach that suits all learning styles and focuses on real communication skills.
about.whyItem1Desc: Our internationally experienced and expert instructors provide personalised training to ensure you get the best results.
about.whyItem2Desc: Using technology-supported and innovative teaching materials, we make your language learning process more efficient and enjoyable.
about.whyItem3Desc: From beginner to advanced level, we offer a wide range of programmes suitable for every age group and need.

services.heroHeading: The Right Course for Every Goal
services.heroDescription: From your first words in a new language to achieving a band 8 IELTS score, we have a programme designed specifically for your needs, schedule, and ambitions.

generalEnglishLevels.description: This level is designed for those who have never encountered English before and have not received any English education. The aim is to establish the foundations of English before moving on to the next level.

This is where your real English education begins. The focus will be on the four main communication skills: listening, speaking, reading and writing. You will learn to form sentences and use English structures correctly. Education is conducted 100% in English.

At this level you will begin to participate in English conversations and understand others with ease. Great emphasis is placed on reading skills to help you understand texts and develop your vocabulary. You will have two teachers — one a native English speaker and one a foreign teacher.

At this level you can call yourself an English speaker. You can express yourself easily and understand almost everything. Once you reach this level you can start preparing for exams such as IELTS and TOEFL.

You are now officially an English speaker. You can watch films without subtitles and speak idiomatically with ease. If you are not aiming for an academic English career, your general English education ends here.

If you are planning an academic career or want to prepare for English exams such as IELTS or TOEFL, this level is exactly for you. Here you can significantly expand your vocabulary, which will be of great benefit in your professional life.

services.generalEnglishHeading: 6 Levels. One Clear Path to Fluency.
services.whatsIncludedBody: When you enrol at London Language Academy, you get far more than just classroom time. Every course comes with a comprehensive suite of support, resources, and opportunities.
services.notSureBody: Our academic advisors are here to help you choose the right course. Book a free 30-minute consultation — no obligation.
services.howItWorksHeading: From Enquiry to First Lesson in 4 Steps
services.timetableBody: We offer four sessions per day, Monday to Thursday and Saturday. Friday is our day off.
services.ctaDescription: Spaces fill quickly, especially for popular morning sessions. Secure your place today.

processSteps.title: Take the Level Test
processSteps.description: Complete our free online placement test to identify your current level across speaking, writing, reading, and listening.

processSteps.title: Speak to an Advisor
processSteps.description: Our academic advisors will review your test results and recommend the most suitable course and schedule for your goals.

processSteps.title: Enrol & Begin
processSteps.description: Complete enrolment online in minutes. Receive your welcome pack, timetable, and access to our student learning portal.

processSteps.title: Track Your Progress
processSteps.description: Receive weekly progress reports, monthly assessments, and continuous feedback from your teacher throughout the course.

languages.heroDescription: From the world's most widely spoken languages to specialist programmes for professionals and exam candidates. Find your language below.
languages.cefrBody: All our courses are aligned to the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR) — the international standard for language level assessment.
languages.approachP1: Our language courses are built on the Communicative Language Teaching (CLT) approach — the most widely researched and consistently effective methodology in modern language pedagogy.
languages.approachP2: Rather than drilling grammar rules in isolation, we place language in real-world contexts from the very first lesson. You will speak, listen, read, and write in situations you will actually encounter.
languages.approachP3: We supplement CLT with task-based learning, content-integrated instruction, and — where appropriate for exam preparation — test strategy coaching.

approachPillars.title: Four Skills Integration
approachPillars.desc: Every lesson develops reading, writing, listening, and speaking in an integrated, natural way.

approachPillars.title: Real-World Contexts
approachPillars.desc: Language is always practised in authentic situations you will encounter outside the classroom.

approachPillars.title: Cultural Competence
approachPillars.desc: Language and culture are inseparable. We build your cultural knowledge alongside linguistic skills.

approachPillars.title: Personalised Feedback
approachPillars.desc: Regular detailed feedback on your speaking and writing accelerates improvement and builds confidence.

languages.ctaTitle: Not Sure Which Language to Learn?
languages.ctaDescription: Our academic team can help you choose the right language based on your career goals, travel plans, or personal interests.
cefrDescriptions: No prior knowledge needed. You will learn greetings, basic vocabulary, and simple sentences.
You understand basic expressions and can communicate in simple, familiar situations.
You can deal with most situations likely to arise whilst travelling and describe experiences.
You can interact with native speakers with a degree of fluency without strain.
You can express ideas fluently and spontaneously without obvious searching for words.
You can express yourself spontaneously, very fluently, and precisely in complex situations.

studyAbroad.heroDescription: We offer overseas education consultancy in 12 countries — from language courses and summer schools to academic placements, internships, and Work & Travel programmes.
studyAbroad.programmesBody: From a 2-week language course to a full academic semester — we guide you every step of the way.
studyAbroad.consultingBody: Our consultants across all departments provide you with the most accurate, practical, and realistic information — helping you make the most suitable choice based on your needs, budget, and goals.
studyAbroad.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your International Journey?
studyAbroad.ctaDescription: Book a free consultation with our study abroad team today.

programmes.title: Language Education Abroad
programmes.description: Study a language in its natural environment. We offer General & Intensive English, Business English, IELTS/TOEFL/GRE/GMAT preparation, Academic Semesters, and specialist courses (Law, Medical, Teacher Training). Programmes run 2–44 weeks, starting every Monday. Minimum age 16; special programmes for 30+.

programmes.title: Summer School
programmes.description: An unforgettable holiday and education programme combining language lessons with sports, cultural activities, and social events. Students experience the language in its natural setting while building friendships from around the world. Destinations include England, USA, Canada, Ireland, Malta, Spain, Germany, and Italy.

programmes.title: Academic Placement
programmes.description: Our advisors guide you through every step of securing a place at a school or university abroad — from choosing the right country and programme to accommodation, scholarships, and visa applications. We cover the UK, USA, Canada, Australia, Ireland, Germany, Italy, and more.

programmes.title: Work & Travel
programmes.description: Designed for undergraduate and postgraduate students, the Work & Travel programme lets you live and work in the United States for up to 4 months, then explore the country for a further 25 days. Gain real work experience, practise your English daily, and discover American culture first-hand.

programmes.title: Internship Programme
programmes.description: Gain hands-on professional experience in an international environment while improving your language skills and earning a competitive monthly salary. Available in Tourism, Marketing, Logistics, Accounting, Finance, IT, Education, and Engineering across the USA, Spain, Malta, Australia, Asia, and the Middle East.

benefits.title: Total Immersion
benefits.description: Every interaction becomes a language learning opportunity. Progress accelerates dramatically when you live the language.

benefits.title: Expert Consultancy
benefits.description: Our consultants provide the most accurate, practical guidance to help you choose the right programme for your goals.

benefits.title: Flexible Durations
benefits.description: From 2-week language courses to full academic semesters — we have options for every timeline and budget.

benefits.title: Cultural Immersion
benefits.description: Sport, social activities, and cultural experiences woven into every programme to enrich your time abroad.

benefits.title: Full Support
benefits.description: From visa guidance to accommodation — we handle the logistics so you can focus on learning and growing.

benefits.title: 12 Countries
benefits.description: England, USA, Canada, Australia, Ireland, Spain, Germany, Italy, Malta, and more — the world is your classroom.

levelTest.heroDescription: Discover your current English level with our 10-question assessment. Each question is calibrated to the CEFR framework (A1–C2). Takes about 5 minutes.
levelTest.note: Note: This test assesses written English only. For a full speaking assessment, contact us to arrange a free 30-minute placement conversation.
levelTest.formSubtitle: We'll send your results and course recommendations to you.
levelTest.formPrivacy: Your details are kept private and used only to send you your results.

a1.label: Beginner
a1.desc: You are just starting your English journey. Our A1 Beginner course is the perfect place to begin — no prior knowledge required!

a2.label: Elementary
a2.desc: You have a basic foundation. Our A2 Elementary course will expand your vocabulary and grammar, building real conversational confidence.

b1.label: Intermediate
b1.desc: You can handle many everyday situations. Our B1 Intermediate course will take your fluency and accuracy to the next level.

b2.label: Upper-Intermediate
b2.desc: You communicate effectively in most situations. Our B2 course — including Cambridge B2 First preparation — is ideal for you.

c1.label: Advanced
c1.desc: You speak and write with high fluency. Our C1 Advanced course will refine your precision and prepare you for Cambridge C1.

c2.label: Proficiency
c2.desc: Exceptional! You are at near-native proficiency. Our C2 Proficiency course or Cambridge C2 preparation programme is the pinnacle.

blog.heroDescription: Expert advice, study guides, and inspiration from the London Language Academy team and our community of language learners.
blog.newsletterBody: Subscribe to get our latest language learning guides and LLA news delivered to your inbox.
blog.readyToLearnBody: Turn insight into action. Browse our courses or take the level test.

faq.heroDescription: Everything you need to know about London Language Academy. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our team is always happy to help.
faq.stillHaveQuestionBody: Our friendly admissions team is available Monday–Friday 9am–6pm and Saturday 10am–4pm to answer any questions.
faq.ctaTitle: Ready to Take the Next Step?
faq.ctaDescription: Browse our courses, take the free level test, or speak to an advisor. We are here to help you find the right path.

items.question: Where is London Language Academy located?
items.answer: Our main school has been based in central London for nearly 100 years. We also have branches in Bursa and Istanbul, Turkey, founded in 2021. All three locations offer the same high-quality language education.
items.answerHtml: Our main school has been based in central London for nearly 100 years. We also have branches in Bursa and Istanbul, Turkey, founded in 2021. All three locations offer the same high-quality language education.

items.question: What age groups do you teach?
items.answer: Our courses are open to learners of all ages. We offer dedicated programmes for adults, young learners, and also Kids courses for younger students.
items.answerHtml: Our courses are open to learners of all ages. We offer dedicated programmes for adults, young learners, and also Kids courses for younger students.

items.question: What other languages can I learn at London Language Academy?
items.answer: At London Language Academy we do not focus only on English — we give equal importance to German, French, Russian, Spanish, Italian and many more languages. We offer group and private lesson options for these languages to cater to various learning needs.
items.answerHtml: At London Language Academy we do not focus only on English — we give equal importance to German, French, Russian, Spanish, Italian and many more languages. We offer group and private lesson options for these languages to cater to various learning needs.

items.question: What types of activities are there?
items.answer: At London Language Academy we go beyond traditional teaching methods. Every day we offer a variety of engaging activities such as speaking, listening, games, makeup and café lessons. We also organise fun outdoor activities every week including volleyball matches, picnics, table tennis, bowling, meet-and-greet parties and more.
items.answerHtml: At London Language Academy we go beyond traditional teaching methods. Every day we offer a variety of engaging activities such as speaking, listening, games, makeup and café lessons. We also organise fun outdoor activities every week including volleyball matches, picnics, table tennis, bowling, meet-and-greet parties and more.

items.question: How long does it take to learn a language?
items.answer: There is no fixed timeframe for learning a language, as we continuously acquire new knowledge throughout our lives. However, if you dedicate yourself intensively to a language, you can generally gain conversational ability within 3 to 6 months. As London Language Academy, we aim to accelerate this process.
items.answerHtml: There is no fixed timeframe for learning a language, as we continuously acquire new knowledge throughout our lives. However, if you dedicate yourself intensively, you can generally gain conversational ability within 3 to 6 months. As London Language Academy, we aim to accelerate this process.

items.question: How many students are in each class?
items.answer: Our classes have between 7 and 14 students.
items.answerHtml: Our classes have between 7 and 14 students.

items.question: Is Turkish spoken during lessons?
items.answer: Our lessons are conducted entirely 100% in English.
items.answerHtml: Our lessons are conducted entirely 100% in English.

items.question: Do you send students abroad for education?
items.answer: We send students abroad through our language education programme, summer school, academic placement programme, internship programme and Work & Travel.
items.answerHtml: We send students abroad through our language education programme, summer school, academic placement programme, internship programme and Work & Travel.

items.question: How do I register for a course?
items.answer: Registering is simple. Take our free online level test to find your level, then contact us via the enquiry form or call us directly. Our team will guide you through the enrolment process, confirm your session times, and get you started.
items.answerHtml: Registering is simple. Take our free online level test to find your level, then contact us via the enquiry form or call us directly. Our team will guide you through the enrolment process, confirm your session times, and get you started.

items.question: What days and times are classes held?
items.answer: Classes run Monday–Wednesday, Tuesday–Thursday, and Saturday–Sunday. Sessions start at 09:00, 13:00 and 19:00.
items.answerHtml: Classes run Monday–Wednesday, Tuesday–Thursday, and Saturday–Sunday. Sessions start at 09:00, 13:00 and 19:00.

items.question: Are makeup / catch-up lessons available?
items.answer: Yes — makeup lessons are available in both general and private formats.
items.answerHtml: Yes — makeup lessons are available in both general and private formats.

items.question: Do activities happen every day?
items.answer: We have speaking activities every single day of the week.
items.answerHtml: We have speaking activities every single day of the week.

items.question: Can I attend activities as much as I want?
items.answer: You can join our speaking clubs free of charge for life.
items.answerHtml: You can join our speaking clubs free of charge for life.

items.question: How do you determine my level?
items.answer: A placement test is conducted verbally or in writing. The written test contains 72 questions covering all course levels. The oral test consists of 5–10 minutes of everyday conversation.
items.answerHtml:
A placement test is conducted verbally or in writing.
• Written test: 72 questions covering all course levels
• Oral test: 5–10 minutes of everyday conversation

items.question: How are classes formed?
items.answer: Students are placed at the appropriate level based on their placement test results and begin their education from there.
items.answerHtml: Students are placed at the appropriate level based on their placement test results and begin their education from there.

items.question: Do you provide course materials?
items.answer: We use Oxford's Headway resources. The books are free and completely original.
items.answerHtml: We use Oxford's Headway resources. The books are free and completely original.

items.question: Do you offer online courses?
items.answer: Yes. All of our courses are available online via live video sessions. Our online courses use the same curriculum, teachers, and materials as our in-person classes, so you get the same quality education from anywhere in the world.
items.answerHtml: Yes. All of our courses are available online via live video sessions. Our online courses use the same curriculum, teachers, and materials as our in-person classes, so you get the same quality education from anywhere in the world.

items.question: Do you prepare students for official exams?
items.answer: Yes. We offer dedicated preparation courses for IELTS, Cambridge B2 First, C1 Advanced and C2 Proficiency, as well as other internationally recognised qualifications.
items.answerHtml: Yes. We offer dedicated preparation courses for IELTS, Cambridge B2 First, C1 Advanced and C2 Proficiency, as well as other internationally recognised qualifications.

items.question: Are your teachers native speakers?
items.answer: Freshman (A1–A2) → Turkish teacher (to avoid communication difficulties). Climber (A2–B1) → Turkish and foreign teachers. Transactional (B1+) and all higher levels → Taught exclusively by our foreign teachers.
items.answerHtml:
Freshman (A1–A2) → Turkish teacher (to avoid communication difficulties)
Climber (A2–B1) → Turkish and foreign teachers
Transactional (B1+) and all higher levels → Taught exclusively by our foreign teachers.

items.question: What qualifications do your teachers hold?
items.answer: All of our teachers are experienced, qualified language educators. Native and non-native teachers are selected through a rigorous process to ensure they meet our high teaching standards. Every teacher undergoes ongoing professional development.
items.answerHtml: All of our teachers are experienced, qualified language educators. Native and non-native teachers are selected through a rigorous process to ensure they meet our high teaching standards. Every teacher undergoes ongoing professional development.

items.question: What study abroad programmes do you offer?
items.answer: We offer five programmes: Language Education Abroad, Summer School, Academic Placement, Work & Travel, and Internship. Each programme is tailored to different goals, durations, and age groups.
items.answerHtml: We offer five programmes: Language Education Abroad, Summer School, Academic Placement, Work & Travel, and Internship. Each programme is tailored to different goals, durations, and age groups.

items.question: Who can apply for a study abroad programme?
items.answer: Our study abroad programmes are open to students of all levels. Whether you are a beginner or advanced learner, we have a suitable programme for you. Some programmes such as internships and academic placements may require a minimum level.
items.answerHtml: Our study abroad programmes are open to students of all levels. Whether you are a beginner or advanced learner, we have a suitable programme for you. Some programmes such as internships and academic placements may require a minimum level.

items.question: How do I apply for a study abroad programme?
items.answer: Simply contact us through the enquiry form on the Study Abroad page or send us a message directly. Our team will explain the available options, help you choose the right programme for your goals, and guide you through every step of the application process.
items.answerHtml: Simply contact us through the enquiry form on the Study Abroad page or send us a message directly. Our team will explain the available options and guide you through every step of the application process.

items.question: Does study abroad include accommodation?
items.answer: Yes. Accommodation arrangements are included or coordinated as part of each programme. Depending on the destination and programme type, options may include host families, student dormitories, or shared apartments.
items.answerHtml: Yes. Accommodation arrangements are included or coordinated as part of each programme. Options may include host families, student dormitories, or shared apartments.

items.question: What countries are available for study abroad?
items.answer: We send students to destinations across the world, including the UK, Ireland, Malta, USA, Canada, Australia and more. Available destinations depend on the programme type. Contact us to see which destinations are currently open.
items.answerHtml: We send students to destinations across the world, including the UK, Ireland, Malta, USA, Canada, Australia and more. Available destinations depend on the programme type. Contact us to see which destinations are currently open.

contact.heroHeading: We Would Love to Hear From You
contact.heroDescription: Whether you have a question about a course, want to book a placement test, or need advice on the right programme — our team is here to help.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your goals, current level, availability, and any specific questions...
contact.consent: I consent to London Language Academy storing my data and contacting me about my enquiry. I understand I can unsubscribe at any time. View our Privacy Policy.
contact.messageSentBody: Thank you for getting in touch. A member of our admissions team will respond to your enquiry within one business day.
contact.responseTime: We typically respond within 1 business day. Urgent? Call us at +44 (0)20 1234 5678.
contact.fastResponseDesc: We reply to all enquiries within 1 business day
contact.expertAdviceDesc: Speak directly with our academic advisors, not a chatbot
contact.noPressureDesc: We provide honest guidance — no pushy sales tactics

footer.tagline: Central London's premier language school. Expert teachers, proven methods, and life-changing results since 2015.
footer.newsletterBody: Get language tips, special offers, and news from the Academy.
footer.copyright: London Language Academy Ltd. All rights reserved.

testimonials.name: Mehmet Yilmaz
testimonials.text: London Language Academy completely transformed my career. After the Business English programme I secured a role at an international software company. The teachers are incredibly supportive and the curriculum is genuinely world-class.

testimonials.name: Ayse Kaya
testimonials.text: I needed IELTS 7.5 for my university application and was stuck at 6.5. After just eight weeks with LLA I achieved 7.5. The mock exams and personalised feedback were the game-changers.

testimonials.name: Emre Demir
testimonials.text: The one-to-one lessons were worth every penny. My teacher adapted every lesson to my specific professional needs. My confidence in client presentations has skyrocketed. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Zeynep Arslan
testimonials.text: Learning English at London Language Academy was a fantastic experience. The teachers are extremely patient and attentive. I passed my Medical English exam on the first attempt.

testimonials.name: Can Ozturk
testimonials.text: I chose the evening German classes and I am so glad I did. Small class sizes mean you actually speak and practise, not just listen. My German improved more in three months here than in two years elsewhere.

testimonials.name: Selin Celik
testimonials.text: The online courses are brilliant — same quality as in-person but from the comfort of my home. The live sessions are engaging and teachers make grammar enjoyable. I have now enrolled for Spanish too!

exam-preparation.title: Exam English
exam-preparation.description: Targeted exam preparation for students at B1 level or above. Our professional tutors guide you through every aspect of your chosen exam — from strategy and structure to timed practice and feedback — so you walk in on exam day fully prepared.

other-languages.title: Other Languages
other-languages.description: Learn German, French, Spanish, or Russian with our expert tutors. Each language is taught across 4 levels — A1 through B2 — giving you a structured, clear path from complete beginner to upper-intermediate. Every level is 3 months and 96 hours of education.

one-to-one.title: One-to-One Tuition
one-to-one.description: Fully personalised private lessons tailored to your goals, schedule, and learning style. Fastest route to fluency.

online-courses.title: Online Courses
online-courses.description: High-quality live online language classes with the same expert teachers and interactive format as in-person sessions.

intensive.title: Intensive Courses
intensive.description: Complete a full level in just 1.5 months. Our intensive programme condenses 96 hours of education into an accelerated schedule — perfect for students who want fast results without compromising on quality.

general-english.title: General English
general-english.description: A structured 6-level programme taking you from absolute beginner to near-native proficiency. Small classes, expert teachers, and a proven curriculum.

commitment.label: Our Commitment
commitment.heading: We Stand Behind Every Student
commitment.body: Two promises that set us apart from every other language school.
commitment.guaranteeBody: If you complete your course and haven't reached your target level, we continue teaching you — completely free of charge — until you do. No conditions, no extra fees. Your success is our responsibility.
guaranteeItems: No time limit on extra lessons
commitment.lifetimeBody: Once a London Language Academy student, always part of our community. After completing your course you get unlimited access to conversation sessions, academy events, and alumni resources — for life.

kids.label: For Kids
kids.heading: Language Learning
kids.body: Children learn languages faster and more naturally than adults. Our Kids programme is designed to make English and other languages fun, engaging, and confidence-building — through games, stories, songs, and interactive activities.

features.title: Fun & Interactive
features.desc: Games, songs, storytelling and creative activities

features.title: Small Groups
features.desc: Maximum 8 kids per class for full attention

home.whyChooseBody: Thousands of students choose us every year. Here is why we are London's most trusted language school.
home.coursesHeading: Find the Right Course for You
home.coursesBody: From beginner to advanced — we have a programme designed for every goal, schedule, and learning style.
home.languagesBody: Whether you want to travel, work, or simply connect with another culture, we have the language for you.
home.testimonialsBody: Real results from real people. Our students' success is the measure of everything we do.
home.studyAbroadHeading: Learn a Language Where It's Actually Spoken
home.studyAbroadBody: Immersion programmes in Spain, France, Germany, Italy, and Portugal. Expert tuition by day, culture and adventure by night.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Language Journey?
home.ctaDescription: Take our free level test, browse our courses, or speak to one of our academic advisors. Your first step to fluency starts here.

resultsFocused.title: Results-Focused Teaching
resultsFocused.description: Every lesson is designed around measurable outcomes. We track your progress weekly and adapt the curriculum to ensure continuous improvement.

expertTeachers.title: Expert Native Speakers
expertTeachers.description: All teachers hold CELTA, DELTA, or equivalent qualifications. Many are former examiners for Cambridge and IELTS, giving you unparalleled insider knowledge.

smallClasses.title: Small Class Sizes
smallClasses.description: Maximum 12 students per group — often fewer. You get genuine speaking time and personalised attention in every single session.

modernCurriculum.title: Modern Curriculum
modernCurriculum.description: Our courses are built on the latest research in language acquisition. We combine proven communicative methods with cutting-edge digital resources.

flexibleScheduling.title: Flexible Scheduling
flexibleScheduling.description: Morning, afternoon, evening, and weekend classes. Online and in-person options. We fit around your life, not the other way around.

accredited.title: Accredited & Trusted
accredited.description: We are accredited by the British Council and registered with the Home Office as a sponsor for student visas. Your education is in safe hands.
